# Helmsman — Skills Catalog (generated)

<!-- GENERATED by skills/harness-audit/scripts/gen-catalog.mjs — do not edit by hand.
     Regenerate: node skills/harness-audit/scripts/gen-catalog.mjs -->

The single place to discover **which skill to use**. Each row: the skill, the agents that
own it (from their `skills:` frontmatter), and its "Use when" trigger (from the skill's
`description:`). To USE a skill, `read` its `SKILL.md` — ours under `.helmsman/skills/<name>/`,
vendored under `.opencode/skills/<name>/` (see operating-rules Rule 4).

## Helmsman skills (ours — 19)

| Skill | Owner agent(s) | Use when |
|-------|----------------|----------|
| `adherence-check` | @helm | Use when "are agents following the harness", "measure drift", "check adherence", or on a periodic harvest. |
| `autoresearch` | @backend, @design, @eng, @mobile | Autonomous iterative optimization loop for maintenance metrics (test coverage up, bundle size down, lint errors to zero). |
| `brain-sync` | @helm | Use when the user says "sync the brain", "pull the brain", "start my session", "push the brain", "save the brain", or works across two machines on the same Supabase brain. |
| `calibrate` | @helm | Use when the user asks "how calibrated are we / were our bets right / are our estimates trustworthy", or on a periodic harvest. |
| `capture` | @helm | Write-back (Loop A), mode-aware. |
| `challenge` | @backend, @eng, @mobile | Pre-flight adversarial review before a high-risk build. |
| `code-review` | @backend, @eng, @mobile, @ship | Production-readiness code review. |
| `done` | _(shared / ritual)_ | Use when the user says "done", "/done", "I'm finished", "wrap up", "save my work", "sync what I did", or finishes a work session. |
| `evolve-memory` | @helm | Use when an agent keeps re-learning the same lesson, "turn our learnings into a skill", "what patterns have we repeated", or periodically to harvest durable knowledge into skills. |
| `gbrain-upgrade` | @helm | Use when asked to "upgrade gbrain", "adapt to new gbrain", "check gbrain version", or after an upstream release. |
| `generate-plan` | @backend, @eng, @mobile | Write a blast-radius implementation spec to process/active/. |
| `harness-audit` | @helm | Use when the user says "audit the harness", "check the harness is coherent", after adding/editing an agent or skill, or before shipping a harness change. |
| `onboard-project` | @helm | Use when setting up Helmsman in a new project, "onboard this project", "set up the harness here", or after install. |
| `phase-programs` | _(shared / ritual)_ | Use when a task is too big for a single PLAN→BUILD pass. |
| `refine` | _(shared / ritual)_ | Self-refine (Loop B). |
| `start` | _(shared / ritual)_ | Use when the user says "start", "/start", "begin", "what was I doing", or sits down to work. |
| `verify` | @backend, @eng, @mobile, @ship | Diff-aware test verification. |
| `watzup` | @chief | Use when the user says "watzup", "where am I", "what's in flight", "status", "what should I do next", or sits down and wants the lay of the land. |
| `xia` | _(shared / ritual)_ | Use when you want to port a pattern or feature from an external repo. |

| Skill | Owner agent(s) | Use when |
